use_cases: Displaying hierarchical stock categories in financial dashboards with expandable sections
Organizing product or inventory categories in e-commerce admin panels
Creating collapsible navigation menus in data-heavy applications
Grouping related data sections in listing interfaces with expand/collapse functionality
Building filterable category UIs for stock screening or product catalogs
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based accordion component designed for displaying stock categories in a collapsible list format. Built with clean Tailwind styling and smooth open/close animations, it serves as a navigation element for organizing hierarchical content in dashboards and data-driven applications. Best suited for fintech platforms and e-commerce systems requiring expandable category filters.
